reference_contract.comparison_policy: Every non-baseline row is compared against the matching mlx_lm.benchmark row for the same random-token prompt and generation shape. ax_engine_mlx is the default direct same-policy comparison; ax_engine_mlx_ngram_accel rows are n-gram acceleration effective-throughput rows.
reference_contract.secondary_reference_policy: mlx-swift-lm rows are admitted only through an explicit BenchmarkHelpers/MLXLMCommon generation adapter that reads the prompt token JSON emitted by this harness and reports prefill/decode metrics for the same random-token prompt/decode shape.
